title: taraxacum brunneum
intro: Taraxacum brunneum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus. It is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, roots, and flowers, which contain compounds like taraxasterol and taraxol with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum brunneum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as tea, infused in water, or used as a tincture, offering a natural remedy for various health issues.
